extension_name.description: Name of the extension shown in the Chrome Web Store and the toolbar.

extension_description.message: Save X posts to a fully offline, on-device archive. Browse and search what you saved later, with no account and no servers.

action_title.description: Tooltip shown when hovering the extension action button in the toolbar.
